mapper.select:
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, IMG_IDX, TITLE, IMG_FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, USE_YN, PRINT_SEQ, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mm') AS ADD_DATE, MAINIMG_LINK FROM CMS_MAIN_IMG WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY PRINT_SEQ ASC, add_date DESC

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, IMG_IDX, TITLE, IMG_FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, USE_YN, PRINT_SEQ, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mm') AS ADD_DATE, MAINIMG_LINK FROM CMS_MAIN_IMG WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND IMG_IDX = #{img_idx}
mapper.update:
UPDATE CMS_MAIN_IMG SET TITLE = #{title},
IMG_FILE_NAME = #{img_file_name}, REAL_FILE_NAME = #{real_file_name}, FILE_EXTENSION = #{file_extension}, FILE_SIZE = #{file_size},
MAINIMG_LINK = #{mainImg_link},
USE_YN = #{use_yn}, PRINT_SEQ = #{print_seq} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND IMG_IDX = #{img_idx}
